title: dianthus pavonius
intro: Dianthus pavonius, also known as the peony pink dianthus, is a species of flowering plant in the carnation family that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that help to soothe and heal wounds, as well as reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. The health benefits of Dianthus pavonius include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Dianthus pavonius can be made by infusing the flowers in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's essential oil in aromatherapy blends.
